tasks.name: SGBRO0 slice (code)
tasks.description: Lock the canonical boundary-order planning surfaces for the first slice.
acceptance_criteria: The first slice keeps the accepted five-slice order intact across the planning pack.
The task graph continues to point at real support-artifact paths.
No later-slice checkpoint behavior is widened here.
start_checklist: git checkout feat/substrate-gateway-boundary-and-runtime-ownership && git pull --ff-only
Read plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, SGBRO0-spec.md, kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
Run: make triad-task-start-pair FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/packs/draft/substrate-gateway-boundary-and-runtime-ownership" SLICE_ID="SGBRO0"
end_checklist: Run fmt/clippy if code surfaces are touched
From inside the worktree: make triad-task-finish TASK_ID="SGBRO0-code"

end_checklist: Run the targeted validation you add or update

Checkpoint evidence can be computed from this core merge state.

make integ-checks

Run local smoke when this machine matches a behavior platform: docs/project_management/packs/draft/substrate-gateway-boundary-and-runtime-ownership/smoke/linux-smoke.sh | docs/project_management/packs/draft/substrate-gateway-boundary-and-runtime-ownership/smoke/macos-smoke.sh | docs/project_management/packs/draft/substrate-gateway-boundary-and-runtime-ownership/smoke/windows-smoke.ps1
From inside the worktree: make triad-task-finish TASK_ID="SGBRO4-integ-core"

tasks.name: CP1 CI checkpoint (cross-platform validation)
tasks.description: Run the checkpoint-boundary validation pass for SGBRO4 before platform-fix tasks proceed.
acceptance_criteria: The checkpoint plan, task graph, and recorded boundary slice are aligned.
Checkpoint evidence is recorded in the session log.
start_checklist: Verify the orchestration checkout is on the feature branch.
Read the checkpoint plan, tasks.json, and session log.
Compute the checkpoint checkout SHA from `SGBRO4-integ-core`.
end_checklist: Record run ids and URLs in session_log.md.
Mark this task completed in tasks.json.
Do not begin final integration until the checkpoint is green.

tasks.name: Feature cleanup
tasks.description: Clean up worktrees and close the feature after the final boundary aggregator lands.
acceptance_criteria: Feature cleanup actions are recorded in the session log.
No planning doc is edited from inside a task worktree.
start_checklist: Verify all feature tasks are complete.
Verify the orchestration checkout is clean.
Read the cleanup prompt.
end_checklist: Run the cleanup commands from the kickoff prompt.
Record the cleanup summary in session_log.md.
Mark this task completed in tasks.json.

tasks.name: SGBRO4 slice (integration linux)
tasks.description: linux platform-fix integration task after the checkpoint.
acceptance_criteria: linux is green for the SGBRO4 smoke and parity requirements.
start_checklist: Run this task on a machine that matches linux.
Read plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, SGBRO4-spec.md, kickoff prompt.
Merge `SGBRO4-integ-core` into this task branch before validation.
Run: make triad-task-start FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/packs/draft/substrate-gateway-boundary-and-runtime-ownership" TASK_ID="SGBRO4-integ-linux" TASK_PLATFORM=linux
end_checklist: Run the required smoke wrapper for this platform: docs/project_management/packs/draft/substrate-gateway-boundary-and-runtime-ownership/smoke/linux-smoke.sh
From inside the worktree: make triad-task-finish TASK_ID="SGBRO4-integ-linux"
Hand off platform evidence to the operator.
